mnemonics.title: Characteristic Table
mnemonics.content: Next state based on current state and inputs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a simple memory element that can store a single bit of binary data
Picture a table that describes the next state of a flip-flop based on its current state and inputs
Think of a signal that controls the timing of a circuit's operation, like a metronome
Imagine a signal that sets a circuit to its initial state, like a reset button
Picture a signal that allows or blocks a circuit's operation, like a switch

analogies.analogy: A light switch that can be turned on or off
A recipe book that describes how to make a dish based on the ingredients and cooking method
A conductor's baton that controls the timing of an orchestra's performance
A reset button on a video game console that sets the game back to its initial state
A switch that turns a device on or off
